signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions | NO | HIGH confidence**

Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions | NO | HIGH confidence**
